product_highlights: 140+ years of lipid and emulsification expertise
Precirol® ATO 5 - Benchmark SLN matrix material
Compritol® 888 ATO - Lipid matrix for NLCs
Transcutol® - Penetration enhancer with extensive safety data
Proven clinical data across cosmetic and pharmaceutical applications
notes: French lipid technology pioneer with 140+ years of expertise. Industry leader in solid lipid nanoparticles (SLNs) and nanostructured lipid carriers (NLCs). Gattefossé's Precirol® and Compritol® are benchmark materials for lipid-based delivery systems. Transcutol® is the gold standard penetration enhancer with extensive safety data. Bridges cosmetic and pharmaceutical delivery science.
